title: Totò, Eva e il pennello proibito
writer: Vittorio Metz, Roberto Gianviti, Jean Halain
plot: When swindler La Spada and his accomplice José are released from jail in Madrid, they decide to pull a really great swindle: nothing less than to discover and sell a third picture of Goya's "Maya in Camison" (Maya in a nightgown)....
